APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF LEFT A VOICE MESSAGE IN DEPT. 206 TO NOTIFY THE COURT THAT HE CAN NOT ATTEND TRIAL CALL BECAUSE HE IS IN THE HOSPITAL. DEFENDANTS REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF NOTIFIED THE DEFENDANTS THAT PLAINTIFF WILL NOT ATTEND TRIAL CALL BECAUSE HE OVERSLEPT. THE COURT WILL DISMISS THIS CASE IF PLAINTIFF DOESN'T REPORT ON 7/11/17 OR DOESN'T HAVE VERIFICATION FROM HIS DOCTOR OR HOSPITAL TO VERIFY HIS ABSENCE ON 7/10/17.
